title: Gesture-Controlled LED Matrix
description: An 8×8 LED matrix display driven by an Arduino Nano, controlled by an MPU-6050 gyroscope/accelerometer worn on the wrist. Tilting the hand left/right scrolls through preset patterns; a wrist flick triggers a random animation. The project introduced us to I2C communication, interrupt-driven sensor reads, and bit-manipulation for driving the matrix via shift registers.
